scripts.benchmark: bun run -e 'import { TestRunner } from "./src_local/agents/Support/test_runner"; const tr = new TestRunner(); tr.benchmark(".").then(r => console.log(JSON.stringify(r, null, 2)))'
scripts.generate-tests: bun run -e 'import { TestArchitectAgent } from "./src_local/agents/Support/test_architect_agent"; const ta = new TestArchitectAgent(); ta.generateMissingTests(".").then(g => console.log(`Generated ${g.length} tests.`))'
scripts.git-doctor: bun run -e 'import { GitAutomaton } from "./src_local/agents/Support/git_automaton"; const ga = new GitAutomaton("."); ga.diagnoseAndFix()'
scripts.clean-obfuscation: bun run -e 'import { HealerPersona } from "./src_local/agents/Support/healer"; const h = new HealerPersona("."); h.cleanFile("src_local/agents/Support/healer.ts")'
scripts.finalize-migration: bun run -e 'import { HealerPersona } from "./src_local/agents/Support/healer_persona"; import { DirectorPersona } from "./src_local/agents/Support/director"; const h = new HealerPersona("."); const d = new DirectorPersona("."); async function f() { await d.validatePhDCensus(); await h.safelyRemoveRedundantFiles(["src_local/agents/base.py"]); console.log("Migration Finalized."); } f()'
